data.title: Medius earns Solutions Partner designation for certified software from Microsoft, meeting program requirements.
data.description: A software company named Medius has recently been recognized for its achievement in developing software solutions on the Microsoft Cloud platform that adhere to interoperability standards and fulfill program criteria. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, in Jacksonville, Florida. Medius, which is a partner of Microsoft, disclosed that they have received a special designation for their work in this area.

data.title: Crayola launches 'Creative Styles Tool' in 2026 to help adults discover their creative styles for boosting confidence.
data.description: The unveiling of the 'Creative Styles Tool' aims to personalize creativity by offering insights to enhance creative confidence and promote collaboration. Crayola, a renowned brand for sparking colorful self-expression and creativity, revealed this innovation on Jan. 15, 2026, in Easton, Pa. The tool is designed to provide tailored recommendations and foster a sense of shared creativity.

data.title: Coinbase withdraws support for Clarity Act draft bill, causing a delay in today's markup session. #crypto #news
data.description: Brian Armstrong and his team have announced their inability to endorse the current draft bill, causing a postponement of the scheduled markup for today.

data.title: ManageEngine named a Challenger in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Management Tools, scores above 4/5 in all 4 use cases.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ManageEngine, a part of Zoho Corporation and a major player in enterprise IT management solutions, has been deemed a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Management Tools. Out of the 18 vendors assessed, ManageEngine scored over 4 out of 5 in all four Gartner Critical Capabilities Use Cases - autonomous endpoint management (4.40/5), unified endpoint management (4.10/5), security-centric management (4.36/5), and frontl.

data.title: MLCworks merges with EisnerAmper, specializing in marketing and business growth solutions, closing the combination in early January.
data.description: A business advisory firm, EisnerAmper, headquartered in New York, shared news on January 15, 2026, that it has joined forces with MLCworks, a specialized digital marketing and business growth advisory firm. This merger was finalized in early January, combining the expertise and resources of both companies. EisnerAmper continues to expand its global reach and strengthen its position in the market through strategic partnerships.

data.title: Gap Inc. names Pam Kaufman as Chief Entertainment Officer. Kaufman will report to Gap Inc. CEO, Richard Dickson.
data.description: Gap Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: GAP), recently disclosed the selection of Pam Kaufman as the Executive Vice President and Chief Entertainment Officer on January 15, 2026, in San Francisco. This newly established position will have Kaufman reporting directly to the President and CEO of Gap Inc., Richard Dickson.

data.title: Huggies donates 15M diapers to National Diaper Bank Network in 15 days to mark 15th anniversary.
data.description: In Chicago on January 15, 2026, Huggies®, a brand under Kimberly-Clark, has joined forces with the National Diaper Bank Network (NDBN) to distribute 15 million donated Huggies diapers within a span of 15 days in honor of the 15-year milestone of the national nonprofit. This significant contribution...

data.title: Honda's U.S. Sales HQ in Southern California achieves CarbonNeutral® Certification, cuts 2,000+ metric tons of emissions.
data.description: In Southern California, the Honda U.S. sales headquarters has become the inaugural Honda site in North America to attain CarbonNeutral® building Certification. By achieving this milestone, the campus has successfully lessened its annual emissions by more than 2,000 metric tons. Situated in Torrance, Calif., the corporate campus is recognized as the premier Honda "Innovation Site," leading the way in driving new sustainability initiatives.

data.title: Free 60-min webinar by ClassDojo for K-12 leaders on improving school-to-home communication on Jan 27, 2026, at 11 AM ET.
data.description: Join ClassDojo for a free 60-minute Learn with Leaders webinar tailored for Districts on January 27, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET. This webinar is specifically crafted to assist district and school leaders in managing increased demands for trust, visibility, and consistency in communicating school-to-home.

data.title: CAPTRUST releases results of 2026 Financial Wellness Survey, highlighting impact of financial stress on employee performance.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by CAPTRUST Financial Advisors in Raleigh, North Carolina, has revealed insightful data on the effects of financial stress on employee performance. Published on January 15, 2026, the report sheds light on the significant impact of financial wellness on employees. The survey focuses on identifying strategies for plan sponsors to alleviate financial stress among employees. The findings emphasize the importance of addressing financial concerns in the workplace. The report provides valuable insights for organizations looking to improve employee performance and well-being.

data.title: Galaxy doubles Helios data center power capacity to over 1.6GW, positioning as a multi-gigawatt AI campus.
data.description: Galaxy Digital Inc. has received approval, marking a significant milestone in its transformation into a multi-gigawatt AI data center campus. This development bolsters Galaxy's long-term strategy. The company, a global pioneer in digital assets and data center management, is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GLXY and on the TSX under the same ticker. This evolution signifies a strategic shift towards harnessing larger capacities, indicating the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the digital assets sector.

data.title: ConnectDER's IslandDER approved by Arizona's 3 largest utilities for faster installation of solar, battery backup, and EV charging.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Phoenix, ConnectDER, a prominent company specializing in meter socket adapters for solar, battery storage, and electric vehicle charging setups, revealed that its latest product, IslandDER™, has been authorized for deployment by the three major utility companies in Arizona.

data.title: Lightpath's AI-driven awards increased by 240%, reaching a total contract value of $362M. They have a $6.4B sales pipeline across 10 US markets.
data.description: A fiber infrastructure provider is making progress on a sales pipeline worth $6.4 billion in 10 data center centric markets in the United States. Lightpath, a company specializing in all-fiber, infrastructure-driven connectivity, is transforming the way organizations establish their digital connections.

data.title: Jackson Hewitt introduces limited-edition Refund Jeans with big pockets for tax refund. Tax Refund Advance loan available all season.
data.description: Enter to win a pair of Refund Jeans and get a Tax Refund Advance loan throughout the year in SARASOTA, Florida. On January 15, 2026, Jackson Hewitt Tax Services® announced their unique offering for the tax season. As a reputable tax preparation service in the US, they are highlighting this special promotion.
